title: calostephane marlothiana
intro: Calostephane marlothiana, also known as the bitter-apple, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Calostephane marlothiana include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or an infusion, and it is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
